children.text: The Welfare and Pension Plans Disclosure Act [ et seq.] is repealed except that such Act shall continue to apply to any conduct and events which occurred before the effective date of this part.29 U.S.C. 301

children.label: A
children.text: is amended by striking out “any such plan subject to the provisions of the Welfare and Pension Plans Disclosure Act” and inserting in lieu thereof “any employee benefit plan subject to any provisions of title I of the Employee Retirement Income Security Act of 1974”.Section 664 of title 18

children.label: i
children.text: Section 1027 of such title 18 is amended by striking out “Welfare and Pension Plans Disclosure Act” and inserting in lieu thereof “title I of the Employee Retirement Income Security Act of 1974”, and by striking out “Act” each place it appears and inserting in lieu thereof “title”.

children.label: ii
children.text: The heading for such section is amended by striking out “” and inserting in lieu thereof “welfare and pension plans disclosure actemployee retirement income security act of 1974”.

children.label: iii
children.text: The table of sections of chapter 47 of such title 18 is amended by striking out “Welfare and Pension Plans Disclosure Act” in the item relating to section 1027 and inserting in lieu thereof “Employee Retirement Income Security Act of 1974”.

children.label: C
children.text: Section 1954 of such title 18 is amended by striking out “any plan subject to the provisions of the Welfare and Pension Plans Disclosure Act as amended” and inserting in lieu thereof “any employee welfare benefit plan or employee pension benefit plan, respectively, subject to any provision of title I of the Employee Retirement Income Security Act of 1974”; and by striking out “sections 3(3) and 5(b)(1) and (2) of the Welfare and Pension Plans Disclosure Act, as amended” and inserting in lieu thereof “sections 3(4) and (3)(16) of the Employee Retirement Income Security Act of 1974”.1So in original. Probably should be “3(16)”.1

children.label: D
children.text: Section 211 of the Labor-Management Reporting and Disclosure Act of 1959 () is amended by striking out “Welfare and Pension Plans Disclosure Act” and inserting in lieu thereof “Employee Retirement Income Security Act of 1974”.29 U.S.C. 441
Except as provided in paragraph (2), this part (including the amendments and repeals made by subsection (a)) shall take effect on .January 1, 1975

In the case of a plan which has a plan year which begins before , and ends after , the Secretary may postpone by regulation the effective date of the repeal of any provision of the Welfare and Pension Plans Disclosure Act (and of any amendment made by subsection (a)(2)) and the effective date of any provision of this part, until the beginning of the first plan year of such plan which begins after .January 1, 1975December 31, 1974January 1, 1975

children.label: c
children.text: The provisions of this subchapter authorizing the Secretary to promulgate regulations shall take effect on .September 2, 1974

children.label: d
children.text: Subsections (b) and (c) shall not apply with respect to amendments made to this part in provisions enacted after .September 2, 1974
